Shared Comments: Room title used on map and room list. Short label shown on room tiles. Max 20 characters. No trailing punctuation. Tone: neutral and concise.
Korean(ko) Comments: 맵과 방 목록에 표시되는 짧은 제목입니다. 모바일에서도 한 줄로 보이도록 20자 이내로 작성하세요.
English(en) Comments: Short label shown on map/room list. Keep under 20 characters. No trailing punctuation.

Shared Comments: Room description shown in room details panel or tooltip. Explains purpose or tips for the room. Use imperative mood for directives. Max ~120 characters. No formatting tags unless documented.
Korean(ko) Comments: 방 상세 정보에 표시됩니다. 전투 준비를 안내하는 문장으로, 모바일에서 줄바꿈될 수 있으니 120자 이내로 작성하세요.
English(en) Comments: Shown in room details; give a brief directive or tip. Keep within ~120 chars. Use imperative tone.

Shared Comments: Room title used on map and list. Keep concise. Max 20 characters.
Korean(ko) Comments: 맵/목록에 보이는 짧은 제목입니다. 20자 이내로 유지하세요.
English(en) Comments: Short label for a normal encounter room. Keep under 20 characters.

Shared Comments: Description for a normal combat room. Explain objective succinctly (e.g., defeat enemies). Max ~120 characters. Prefer imperative phrasing.
Korean(ko) Comments: 목표(예: 적 처치)를 간단히 설명하세요. 모바일에서 보이는 길이를 고려해 120자 이내로.
English(en): Defeat the enemies and claim your reward!
English(en) Comments: Used in room info; short objective statement. Keep concise and imperative.

Shared Comments: Room title for laboratory-type rooms. Short label; max 20 characters. Indicate special mechanics if needed.
Korean(ko) Comments: 실험/기계 관련 방을 나타내는 짧은 제목입니다. 20자 이내 권장.
English(en) Comments: Short label for laboratory rooms. Keep under 20 characters.

Shared Comments: Description for laboratory rooms. Mention hazards/special mechanics. Provide usage hints if necessary. Max ~120 characters.
Korean(ko): 실험실: 실험 장비와 함정이 존재합니다. 주의해서 진행하세요!
Korean(ko) Comments: 특수 효과나 함정 등 주의사항을 포함하세요. 모바일 표시 길이(약 120자) 고려.
English(en): Lab: contains experimental equipment and hazards. Proceed with caution!
English(en) Comments: Shown in room details; mention hazards/special mechanics. Keep concise.

Shared Comments: Room title for arena/colosseum. Short label; max 20 characters. Indicates combat challenge.
Korean(ko) Comments: 연속 전투/대전 형식의 방을 나타냅니다. 짧게 표기(20자 이내).
English(en) Comments: Short label for arena/colosseum. Keep under 20 characters.

Shared Comments: Description for colosseum/arena rooms. Explain challenge type (e.g., consecutive fights) and rewards. Max ~120 characters.
Korean(ko): 투기장: 연속 전투에 도전하여 더 높은 보상을 획득하세요!
Korean(ko) Comments: 연속 전투 형식과 보상 관련 설명을 간결하게 적으세요. 모바일 표시 길이 유의.
English(en): Colosseum: challenge consecutive fights to earn greater rewards!
English(en) Comments: Used in room details; describe challenge/reward briefly.

Shared Comments: Room title for shop. Single-word label preferred. Max 12-15 characters for UI fit.
Korean(ko) Comments: UI 버튼/목록에 표시되는 제목입니다. 가능하면 한 단어로, 길이 제한(모바일) 고려.
English(en) Comments: Single-word label for shop; prefer short form for UI placement.

Shared Comments: Description for shop rooms. Explain what players can buy or exchange (credits, items). Max ~120 characters. Do not include currency symbol assumptions unless specified.
Korean(ko) Comments: 구매 방식(예: 크레딧 사용)을 명확히 적으세요. 모바일 레이아웃을 고려해 120자 이내로.
English(en) Comments: Shown in room details; briefly explain purchase/exchange mechanics. Keep concise.

Shared Comments: Room title for boss encounters. Short label; max 20 characters. Indicate high difficulty.
Korean(ko) Comments: 보스 전투가 발생하는 방 제목입니다. 중요도를 나타내므로 명확하게 표기(20자 이내).
English(en) Comments: Short label for boss encounter rooms. Keep under 20 characters and clear.

Shared Comments: Description for boss rooms. Warn players about high difficulty; advise preparation. Max ~120 characters. Use imperative suggestions (prepare, strategize).
Korean(ko): 보스 방: 강력한 적이 기다립니다. 전략을 세워 도전하세요!
Korean(ko) Comments: 난이도 경고와 준비 권고를 포함하세요. 모바일에서 줄바꿈을 고려해 120자 이내로 작성.
English(en): Boss Room: a powerful enemy awaits. Plan your strategy before engaging!
English(en) Comments: Shown in room details; warn of difficulty and advise preparation. Keep concise and imperative.

Shared Comments: Title for credit currency shown in UI (reward list, popup). Keep short (<=12 chars). Do not include numeric value.
Korean(ko) Comments: 화폐 단위로 UI에 짧게 표시됩니다. 숫자와 함께 쓰지 마세요.
English(en) Comments: Currency title; short label for UI.

Shared Comments: Description explaining what credits are and how they are used. Keep concise (~120 chars).
Korean(ko): 게임 내 화폐입니다. 상점에서 아이템이나 보상을 구매하는 데 사용됩니다.
Korean(ko) Comments: 구매 용도와 사용처를 간단히 설명하세요. 모바일에서 줄바꿈될 수 있으니 120자 이내로.
English(en): In-game currency used to purchase items and rewards in shops.
English(en) Comments: Briefly explain purpose and usage of credits. Keep within ~120 chars.

Shared Comments: Title for 'Chrome' resource shown in UI. Short label (<=12 chars).
Korean(ko) Comments: 자원 명칭(짧게). UI 레이아웃에 맞게 12자 이내 권장.
English(en) Comments: Resource name; short label for UI.

Shared Comments: Description for Chrome resource: explain use (e.g., upgrade, crafting). Keep concise (~120 chars).
Korean(ko): 크롬: 장비 업그레이드나 제작에 사용되는 희귀 자원입니다.
Korean(ko) Comments: 자원 사용처(업그레이드/제작 등)를 간단히 명시하세요. 120자 이내 권장.
English(en): Chrome: a rare resource used for equipment upgrades and crafting.
English(en) Comments: Describe use briefly; keep within ~120 chars.

Shared Comments: Title for a healing pack/consumable. Single-word or short phrase preferred.
Korean(ko) Comments: 짧은 소모품 이름. UI 표시를 고려해 12자 이내 권장.
English(en) Comments: Short consumable item name for UI.

Shared Comments: Description for heal pack: amount or effect summary. Avoid exact numeric formats unless specified; ~120 chars.
Korean(ko): 사용 시 즉시 체력을 회복합니다. 회복량은 장비에 따라 달라집니다.
Korean(ko) Comments: 효과 요약(즉시 회복 등). 정확한 수치는 별도 표기 시 안내하세요.
English(en): Restores a portion of health instantly when used. Exact amount may vary.
English(en) Comments: Summarize effect; avoid embedding dynamic numbers unless documented.

Shared Comments: Title for tech selection pack from Company1. Use company name if fits UI. Keep short.
Korean(ko) Comments: 회사의 이름 표기 방식 일관성 유지. UI 여유가 없으면 '기술팩'만 사용.
English(en) Comments: Short label indicating tech pack and provider company.

Shared Comments: Description for this tech select pack: explain that player can choose a tech from the company's pool. ~120 chars.
Korean(ko): 이 팩을 획득하면 회사1의 기술 중 하나를 선택할 수 있습니다.
Korean(ko) Comments: 선택형 보상임을 명확히 표기하세요. 모바일 표시 길이 고려.
English(en): Open this pack to choose one tech from Company1's selection.
English(en) Comments: Clarify it's a selectable tech pack; keep concise.

Shared Comments: Title for tech selection pack from Company2. Keep short.
Korean(ko) Comments: 회사명 표기 방식 일관성 유지.
English(en) Comments: Short label for company-specific tech pack.

Shared Comments: Description for company2 tech pack: same guidance as other tech select packs.
Korean(ko): 이 팩을 획득하면 회사2의 기술 중 하나를 선택할 수 있습니다.
Korean(ko) Comments: 선택형 보상임을 명확히. 120자 이내 권장.
English(en): Open this pack to choose one tech from Company2's selection.
English(en) Comments: Keep concise and informative.

Shared Comments: Title for tech selection pack from Company3. Keep short for UI.
Korean(ko) Comments: 회사명 표기 일관성 유지. UI 공간 제한 주의.
English(en) Comments: Short UI label for tech pack.

Shared Comments: Description for company3 tech pack. Explain selectable nature and hint at unique theme if any.
Korean(ko): 이 팩을 획득하면 회사3의 기술 중 하나를 선택할 수 있습니다.
Korean(ko) Comments: 특징적인 테마가 있으면 간단히 적으세요. 120자 이내 권장.
English(en): Open this pack to choose one tech from Company3's selection.
English(en) Comments: Keep concise; mention selectable mechanic.

Shared Comments: Title for tech selection pack from Company4. Short label.
Korean(ko) Comments: UI 공간 고려, 회사명 생략 가능.
English(en) Comments: Short label; keep under 20 chars.

Shared Comments: Description for company4 tech pack. Same pattern as other company packs.
Korean(ko): 이 팩을 획득하면 회사4의 기술 중 하나를 선택할 수 있습니다.
Korean(ko) Comments: 선택형 보상이라는 점을 분명히 표기하세요.
English(en): Open this pack to choose one tech from Company4's selection.
English(en) Comments: Concise description of selectable reward.

Shared Comments: Title for tech selection pack from Company5. Short UI label.
Korean(ko) Comments: 회사명 표기 일관성 유지.
English(en) Comments: Short label for company tech pack.

Shared Comments: Description for company5 tech pack. Keep similar wording to other company tech packs.
Korean(ko): 이 팩을 획득하면 회사5의 기술 중 하나를 선택할 수 있습니다.
Korean(ko) Comments: 모바일 표시 길이(120자) 내로 작성.
English(en): Open this pack to choose one tech from Company5's selection.
English(en) Comments: Keep concise and consistent across packs.

Shared Comments: Title for a tech upgrade pack/item used to upgrade existing tech. Short label.
Korean(ko) Comments: 업그레이드 관련 아이템임을 짧게 표기.
English(en) Comments: Short label indicating upgrade item.

Shared Comments: Description: explains that this pack upgrades a tech or unlocks enhancement options. Keep concise (~120 chars).
Korean(ko): 기술의 성능을 강화하거나 업그레이드할 수 있는 재료입니다.
Korean(ko) Comments: 업그레이드 효과를 간단히 서술하세요. 구체 수치는 별도 표기.
English(en): Use this pack to upgrade a tech or unlock enhancement options.
English(en) Comments: Describe upgrade purpose briefly; avoid embedding exact numbers.

Shared Comments: Title for mutant pack / Mutant-related reward. Short label.
Korean(ko) Comments: 특수 보상임을 표시. UI 여유에 따라 한 단어 권장.
English(en) Comments: Short label for mutant-themed reward.

Shared Comments: Description: explains mutant pack contents (e.g., random mutant ability or resource). Keep concise (~120 chars).
Korean(ko): 돌연변이 관련 보상입니다. 랜덤 능력 또는 돌연변이 재료를 포함할 수 있습니다.
Korean(ko) Comments: 랜덤 보상 여부와 주요 구성 요소를 간단히 설명하세요.
English(en): Contains mutant-related rewards such as random abilities or mutation materials.
English(en) Comments: Clarify contents and randomness; keep concise.

Shared Comments: Title for Reinforce/Upgrade UI or reward menu. Short label shown on buttons/panels. Keep concise (<=15 chars).
Korean(ko) Comments: 장비/기술 강화 관련 UI에서 사용하는 짧은 제목입니다. 버튼/패널에 맞게 15자 이내로 유지하세요.
English(en) Comments: Short label for reinforce/upgrade UI or reward. Keep concise (<=15 chars).

Shared Comments: Title for Record/Log/History screens (e.g., play record, achievements). Short label for UI. Keep concise (<=20 chars).
Korean(ko) Comments: 플레이 기록·업적 등 기록 관련 화면에서 사용하는 짧은 제목입니다. 모바일에서 잘 보이도록 20자 이내 권장.
English(en) Comments: Short label for record/log screens (play history, achievements). Keep under ~20 chars.

Shared Comments: Description for reinforce/upgrade UI or item. Explain what reinforcing does and required resources (materials/credits). Keep concise (~120 chars).
Korean(ko): 강화: 장비나 기술의 성능을 향상시킵니다. 재료와 크레딧을 사용하여 강화할 수 있습니다.
Korean(ko) Comments: 강화의 효과와 필요한 자원(재료/크레딧)을 간단히 설명하세요. 구체 수치는 별도 표기.
English(en): Reinforce: improves equipment or tech performance using materials and credits.
English(en) Comments: Briefly explain effect and required resources; avoid embedding exact numbers. Keep within ~120 chars.

Shared Comments: Description for record/log/history screens. Explain what users can view (play history, achievements, stats). Keep concise (~120 chars).
Korean(ko): 기록: 플레이 히스토리, 획득 업적 및 주요 통계를 확인할 수 있습니다.
Korean(ko) Comments: 기록 화면에서 확인할 수 있는 항목을 간단히 서술하세요. 모바일 표시 길이(약 120자) 고려.
English(en): Record: view play history, achievements earned, and key statistics.
English(en) Comments: Describe what users can see in the record screen; keep concise and within ~120 chars.
